GAFFER'SGUIDE

Math meets the Beautiful Game

Bridging computer vision tracking with universal tactical philosophies. We eliminate the noise by tracking high-fidelity player coordinate data in real-time, mapping complex spatial relationships into actionable tactical maneuvers. No guesswork, just pure geometric dominance.

Built by engineers from elite quantitative trading firms alongside seasoned tactical analysts, our engine processes raw match footage securely on your hardware. It identifies structural vulnerabilities and exposes defensive gaps before the opposition even surfaces them, seamlessly aligning computational power with world-class coaching.

AI Coaching Engine — v1.0

YourTactics
Decoded

Ingest raw match footage. Extract coordinate data. Identify strategic vulnerabilities instantly. Processed securely offline.

The Transformation Layer

From raw pixels to actionable touchline insights in < 200ms.

Raw Footage Pipeline

Drop your standard match broadcast or tactical camera feed. The engine immediately begins frame-by-frame processing without sending data to the cloud.

Total Data Sovereignty.

Your tactical IP never leaves your machine. The Gaffer's Guide engine runs a quantized visual transformer directly on your local silicon, completely offline.

Data Residency
Offline / Air-gapped
Processing Latency
< 12ms (RTX Series)
Uplink Requirement

Telemetry
Disabled by default
